violations.description: Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. No paper towels were available at the hand sink near the dish machine. Paper towel should be available at all times.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Paper towels were not available at hand washing sinks. Handwashing sinks should be provided with paper towels at all times.
